text.p: Good to hear that u are settling in nicely, thank God for the children's school, they will excel in all, to the extent that everybody in school will wonder what special people they are, and through them,other kids and teachers will know and serve our God in Jesus' Name.

I wish you God's speed and favour in all, I will greet specially for you ma, He turns 4 on monday 15th and had a nice time in school, E ba wa ki gbogbo ebi, greetings from my hubby too. God be with you.
Dearest Sister( Ore Mi, Aunty Mi...etc...),

(Laughssssss) E ma binu o jare, The African thing is just by the way,,,anyway we are still africans,no matter where we are, sorry for the late reply,(I wouldnt have neglected mails from you),we had a long weekend from thursday.just reading mails since wednesday, se alaafia ni gbogbo Ebi wa and how was church yesterday?

Thank you for this inspiring milk and honey, God bless you, It is true that we should only focus on God and not how HE will do it, It wasnt boring at all... It has come to me at the right time. Thanks again. Oyin ati Ayo Olorun ko ni kuro l'aye yin,Amin.

It just occured to me, How did you keep your cars at home? is anyone staying in your house? It is well with you and all yours in Jesus' Name., do have a pleasantly blessed and fulfilled week while I am looking forward to hearing from you again...it can never be boring with you.
Regards to uncle, and , hope they didn't have to re-take the class they had taken in Nigeria 'cos of the transfer, It is well with them.
